mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shift_schedule (group_id, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO shift_schedule (group_id, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.groupId}, #{item.dayOfWeek}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE shift_schedule SET group_id = #{groupId}, day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
